scripts.deploy: npm run build && rsync -avz --delete --exclude='test-assets/' --exclude='.DS_Store' dist/ root@acorn:/root/picodevil/dist/
scripts.//deploy: rsyncs the built site to acorn. but it only works for me, you're not allowed to ssh into acorn.
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:monkey:replay && npm run test:url-state && npm run test:upload && npm run test:blob-playback && npm run test:stress:headless && npm run test:bench:check && npm run test:golden && npm run test:golden:examples && npm run test:monkey
scripts.test:bench:check: if test -f test/baselines/example-perf.json; then npm run bench:examples:check; else echo '⚠  bench baseline missing – run bench:examples:capture first'; fi
scripts.test:golden: if test -d test/golden; then npm run golden:compare; else echo '⚠  goldens missing – run golden:capture first'; fi
scripts.test:golden:examples: if test -d test/golden-examples; then npm run golden:examples:compare; else echo '⚠  golden-examples missing – run golden:examples:capture first'; fi
